notes: Elicia's six-face arcana die. Same structure as Frasier's; the WILD face resolves on whether the listener has Insight banked instead of Faith adjacent or Inspiration banked.

faces.description: Success ★★. The take is clean. Print it.
Success ★. The level is right; the take holds.
Partial. Spend 1 Insight to convert to ★.
Partial. Spend 1 Insight to convert to ★.
Failure. The take has a bump. +1 Insight.
Wild. Counts as ★ if you have at least 1 Insight banked; counts as failure otherwise.
